name: ext-archive-c
description: Safe archive parsing/extraction helpers + pinned archive policies (tar/tgz/zip v1).
docs:
Safe archive parsing/extraction helpers + pinned archive policies (tar/tgz/zip v1).

Modules:
- std.archive
- std.archive.issue
- std.archive.json_doc
- std.archive.policy
- std.archive.tar
- std.archive.tgz
- std.archive.zip
- std.archive.tests

Usage:
- Add dependency: x07 pkg add ext-archive-c@0.1.5
- Prefer std.archive.safe_extract_v1(out_root, bytes, profile_id) as the high-level hardened entry point.
- Use std.archive.*.extract_tree_from_arch_v1 helpers with repo-pinned profiles under arch/archive.
